CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,943.96 FILED BY WASHINGTON JOHNNY WASHINGTON ANGELA WILLIAMS WILLIE RENE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HOLMAN CHRISTOPHER JILES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMAN CHRISTOPHER JILES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WASHINGTON JOHNNY WASHINGTON ANGELA WILLIAMS WILLIE RENE BOTH PARTIES WERE EQUALLY AT FAULT AND SHOULD MAKE THEIR OWN REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WASHINGTON JOHNNY WASHINGTON ANGELA WILLIAMS WILLIE RENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HOLMAN CHRISTOPHER JILES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
